data.reasoningText:
Let me break down the requirements:

1. Blazor Web App for logistics/shipment tracking
2. Dispatchers view shipments with status and destination
3. Customers check shipment status and estimated delivery
4. Global users - need to minimize latency
5. Fast first load, then snappy without server round-trips
6. Every page has interactive controls
7. Authentication with individual accounts

Given the requirements:
- "Fast first load" → Server-side rendering for initial load
- "Snappy without server round-trips" + "worldwide users" + "every page interactive" → WebAssembly for interactivity after initial load


- This points to Auto render mode (Server then WebAssembly)
- Individual accounts → Identity framework

So I'll set up a Blazor Web App with Auto interactivity mode and Individual accounts authentication.

I'll also need to register the HttpClient in the Client project and set up some sample shipment data to seed.

6. **Navigation** - Update the nav menu to reflect these new pages, and make sure role claims are included in the serialization.

I'm making sure DTOs live in the Client project for sharing, the Shipment entity goes in the server's Data folder, and I'm using minimal APIs for the endpoints. All interactive pages will use Auto render mode with role-based authorization, and I need to verify that the auth state serialization includes roles through the `SerializeAllClaims` option.

+using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Identity;
+
+namespace ShipmentTracker.Data;
+
+public static class SeedData
+{
+    public static async Task InitializeAsync(IServiceProvider services)
+    {
+        using var scope = services.CreateScope();
+        var db = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService<ApplicationDbContext>();
+        var userManager = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService<UserManager<ApplicationUser>>();
+        var roleManager = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService<RoleManager<IdentityRole>>();
+
+        await db.Database.EnsureCreatedAsync();
+
+        // Seed roles
+        foreach (var role in new[] { "Dispatcher", "Customer" })
+        {
+            if (!await roleManager.RoleExistsAsync(role))
+                await roleManager.CreateAsync(new IdentityRole(role));
+        }
+
+        // Seed a dispatcher account
+        var dispatcher = await userManager.FindByEmailAsync("dispatcher@shiptracker.com");
+        if (dispatcher is null)
+        {
+            dispatcher = new ApplicationUser
+            {
+                UserName = "dispatcher@shiptracker.com",
+                Email = "dispatcher@shiptracker.com",
+                EmailConfirmed = true
+            };
+            await userManager.CreateAsync(dispatcher, "Dispatch123!");
+            await userManager.AddToRoleAsync(dispatcher, "Dispatcher");
+        }
+
+        // Seed a customer account
+        var customer = await userManager.FindByEmailAsync("customer@example.com");
+        if (customer is null)
+        {
+            customer = new ApplicationUser
+            {
+                UserName = "customer@example.com",
+                Email = "customer@example.com",
+                EmailConfirmed = true
+            };
+            await userManager.CreateAsync(customer, "Customer123!");
+            await userManager.AddToRoleAsync(customer, "Customer");
+        }
+
+        // Seed shipments if empty
+        if (!db.Shipments.Any())
+        {
+            var now = DateTime.UtcNow;
+
+            db.Shipments.AddRange(
+                new Shipment
+                {
+                    TrackingNumber = "TRK-20260101-0001",
+                    Origin = "New York, NY",
+                    Destination = "Los Angeles, CA",
+                    Status = ShipmentStatus.InTransit,
+                    CreatedAt = now.AddDays(-3),

+                    RecipientName = "Alice Johnson",
+                    Description = "Electronics — Laptop",
+                    WeightKg = 2.5,
+                    CustomerId = customer.Id
+                },
+                new Shipment
+                {
+                    TrackingNumber = "TRK-20260101-0002",
+                    Origin = "Chicago, IL",
+                    Destination = "Miami, FL",
+                    Status = ShipmentStatus.Pending,
+                    CreatedAt = now.AddDays(-1),

+                    RecipientName = "Bob Smith",
+                    Description = "Furniture — Office Chair",
+                    WeightKg = 15.0,
+                    CustomerId = customer.Id
+                },
+                new Shipment
+                {
+                    TrackingNumber = "TRK-20260101-0003",
+                    Origin = "Seattle, WA",
+                    Destination = "Austin, TX",
+                    Status = ShipmentStatus.OutForDelivery,
+                    CreatedAt = now.AddDays(-5),
+                    EstimatedDelivery = now,
+                    RecipientName = "Carol Davis",
+                    Description = "Books — Technical Manuals",
+                    WeightKg = 4.2,
+                    CustomerId = customer.Id
+                },
+                new Shipment
+                {
+                    TrackingNumber = "TRK-20260101-0004",
+                    Origin = "Boston, MA",
+                    Destination = "Denver, CO",
+                    Status = ShipmentStatus.Delivered,
+                    CreatedAt = now.AddDays(-10),
+                    EstimatedDelivery = now.AddDays(-3),
+                    ActualDelivery = now.AddDays(-4),
+                    RecipientName = "Dan Wilson",
+                    Description = "Medical Supplies",
+                    WeightKg = 8.0,
+                    CustomerId = customer.Id
+                },
+                new Shipment
+                {
+                    TrackingNumber = "TRK-20260101-0005",
+                    Origin = "San Francisco, CA",
+                    Destination = "Portland, OR",
+                    Status = ShipmentStatus.PickedUp,
+                    CreatedAt = now.AddDays(-1),

+                    RecipientName = "Eve Martinez",

+                }
+            );
+
+            await db.SaveChangesAsync();
+        }
+    }
+}
